name: Viltrox AF 85mm f/1.8 II Lens
description: Distinguished by its updated sleeker and lighter weight design, the Viltrox AF 85mm f/1.8 FE II is the second-generation of this portrait-length prime designed for Sony E-mount mirrorless cameras.

features.Key Features:: E-Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/1.8 to f/16 | One Extra-Low Dispersion Element | One Aspherical Element | HD Nano Multi-Layer Coating | STM Stepping AF Motor | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm | Electronic Contacts & Aperture Selection | USB Port for Firmware Updates
